title: Adaptive Cards: The Missing UI Layer for Enterprise Human-in-the-Loop Automation
author: Sivasankar Thalavai
excerpt:
Adaptive Cards: The Missing UI Layer for Enterprise Human-in-the-Loop AI-Automation
The problem enterprises keep hitting
Enterprises are rapidly automating workflows using AI, APIs, and event-driven systems.
But the moment automation touches money, people, or compliance, a hard requirement appears:
A human must stay in control.
Traditional solutions fall short:
- Custom portals are slow to build and hard to govern
- Emails are unauditable and easily ignored
- Chatbots without structure are risky
